title: LEGO Star Wars Clone Trooper & Battle Droid Battle Pack, incl. 4 Minifigures, 5 Droids and a Speeder Bike with Shooters - Building Toys for 7+ Year Old Boys & Girls 75372
features: Clone Trooper & Battle Droid Battle Pack – Recreate Star Wars: The Clone Wars scenes with Star Wars figures, minifigures, a speeder bike and more
4 LEGO Star Wars minifigures and 5 figures – A Clone Shock Trooper, 3 Clone Troopers, 3 Super Battle Droids and 2 Battle Droids with accessories
Buildable LEGO Star Wars toy speeder bike for kids – The speeder bike has 2 stud shooters, 2 holders for blasters and space for 2 Clone Troopers
Unlimited creative play – This LEGO Star Wars set includes a tri-droid figure with a rotating top and 3 flick shooters, and much more
Star Wars vehicles and accessories – Includes a STAP speeder for a Battle Droid, a defensive post with stud shooter and a thermal detonator element
LEGO Star Wars gifts for fans aged 7 and over – Give this fun, collectible Star Wars building toy to kids, boys and girls who are into Star Wars: The Clone Wars
description: From the manufacturer Action-packed buildable toy playset for kids Inspire young fans to recreate epic Star Wars: The Clone Wars scenes with this collectible LEGO Star Wars toy building set. Fun battles and creative play Role-play Clone Trooper vs. Battle Droid battles with awesome brick-built Star Wars toy vehicles and iconic accessories. LEGO Star Wars Clone Trooper & Battle Droid Battle Pack 4 LEGO Star Wars minifigures A Clone Shock Trooper and 3 Clone Troopers. 5 LEGO figures 3 Super Battle Droids and 2 Battle Droids. Speeder bike Activate the speeder bike’s 2 stud shooters. Tri-droid Fire the tri-droid’s 3 flick shooters. STAP speeder Drive the Battle Droids’ STAP speeder. Defensive post Target the Super Battle Droids from the defensive post. Fun buildable gift toy for Star Wars fans This building set is great to play with on its own or together with other LEGO Star Wars sets (sold separately).
